zh.lifeSummary: John de Milbourne I於1325年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特米爾波內 波特。他於1349年與Isabel de Kingston在英國素瑞金斯頓 武朋 坦斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John de Milbourne I was born in 1325, in Milborne Port, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. He married Isabel de Kingston in 1349, in Kingston upon Thames, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Milbourne Iは1325年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトミルボルン ポルトで生まれた。1349年にイギリススリーキングストン ウプオン サムスでIsabel de Kingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Milbourne I(은)는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 미본 포트에서 태어났다. 그는 1349년 영국 수리 킨그스턴 업 섬스에서 Isabel de Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
